allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'ML service OK — {len\(d[\\"symptoms\\"]\)} symptoms'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if d.get\('success'\) else 'FAIL:',d.get\('error',''\)\); print\('  source:', d.get\('source'\)\); print\('  patient:', d.get\('patient_name'\),'| date:',d.get\('report_date'\),'| lab:',d.get\('lab_name'\)\); print\('  tests:', len\(d.get\('tests',[]\)\)\); print\('  abnormal:', [\(a['name'],a['value'],a['status']\) for a in d.get\('abnormal_values',[]\)]\); print\('  summary:', d.get\('summary'\)\)")
